title: Boom-Bap Rap (Golden Era)
summary: 90 BPM golden-age hip-hop instrumental - chopped soul sample, fat boom-bap kick + snare.
prompt: A classic golden-era boom-bap hip-hop instrumental at 90 BPM. Chopped soul sample loop with vinyl crackle, fat dusty boom-bap kick and crisp snare on the 2 and 4, head-nod bassline, occasional record-scratch accents, jazzy horn stab. East-coast 90s underground feel - sample-based production with warm analog grit. No vocals.
